slogan.en: Fast, modern testing powered by Rspack
slogan.zh: 由 Rspack 驱动，提供快速、现代的测试体验

reuseBuildConfigDesc.en: Use existing Rsbuild or Rspack config so aliases, transforms, and plugins stay consistent in tests.
reuseBuildConfigDesc.zh: 直接使用 Rsbuild 或 Rspack 配置，让 alias、transform 和插件能力在测试中保持一致。

productionAccurateTestingDesc.en: Run tests through Rspack's bundling model to match production behavior more closely.
productionAccurateTestingDesc.zh: 通过 Rspack 的 bundle 模型运行测试，让测试行为更贴近生产产物。

blazingFastDesc.en: Rspack-powered bundling keeps startup and reruns fast, even in larger projects.
blazingFastDesc.zh: 基于 Rspack 的构建与优化能力，在大型项目中也能保持快速启动和重新运行。

realBrowserTestingDesc.en: Run tests in Chromium, Firefox, or WebKit through Playwright when jsdom isn't enough.
realBrowserTestingDesc.zh: 基于 Playwright 在 Chromium、Firefox、WebKit 中运行测试，覆盖 jsdom 难以验证的场景。

modernByDefaultDesc.en: TypeScript, ESM, CJS, CSS Modules, and modern JavaScript work out of the box.
modernByDefaultDesc.zh: TypeScript、ESM、CJS、CSS Modules 和现代 JavaScript 开箱即用。

testingReadyDesc.en: Use Jest-compatible assertions, snapshots, mocks, coverage, and lifecycle hooks out of the box.
testingReadyDesc.zh: 兼容 Jest 的断言、快照、Mock、覆盖率和生命周期钩子等能力开箱即用。
